title: Cal's OG Glint
description: Brings back the original enchantment glint used on armour, tools etc.
body:
# Cal's OG Glint
Do you hold a grudge against the new glint that was added in 1.19.3?
This resource pack changes the glint that you can see on your in-game armour or weapons. 
# 
![Look at the enchantment glint from the player inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1e03d9f2f00dc70f28b90f84a2b9234be186bd0.png)
